cobb.discrepancy_note: COBB offloaded_quantity_kg (12,419.35 kg) is consistent with scale-ticket math but DIFFERS from Ops Notes Cargo Mass (12,031.44 kg) by 387.91 kg. Likewise sister batch 2-184/offload_3: COBB shows 21,457.08 vs Ops Notes 21,844.99 (off by 387.91 kg in opposite direction). Sum across 4 offloads = 78,020 kg in both files. Suggests 387.91 kg was misallocated between offload_3 and offload_4 in the Ops Notes table.

carbon_ef._note: 0.1038 corresponds to H2 2025 LCA period (1Jul2025-31Dec2025); KB's 0.10402 is the H1 2026 value. Different LCA period for this batch's biomass production. Acceptable.

uncertainty_per_component.summary: All 9 components inspected via modal. All 6 mass-of-load uncertainties match expected ±72.57 kg per discrete weight (one outbound weighing) per per-removal framing. Carbon content uncertainty matches expected 0.4% × Measured Value. Embodied components correctly have no mass datapoint (per-mile methodology). Pyrolysis EF reflects H2 2025 LCA period.

bcu_transport_check.calc_check: 0.148 + 0.685 + 0.059 = 0.892 — BCU exactly equals sum of 3 transport process emissions ✓

gross_co2e_from_scale_ticket_mass._note: Difference is conservative-for-Charm (under-claims credits); below 5% materiality threshold but represents data accuracy error

net_recalc.formula: Sequestrations - Activities + Adjustments(BCU) - Counterfactuals - Losses - UncertaintyDiscount

_cross_check_findings_for_gate_2.finding: MASS DISCREPANCY (likely FAIL on item 2.4 / 2.7 / 5.4): Ops Notes Cargo Mass for offload_4 = 12,031.44 kg, but COBB offloaded_quantity_kg = 12,419.35 kg, and scale-ticket-derived (Loaded 56,660 - Unloaded 29,280) × 0.453592 = 12,419.4 kg. The Ops Notes value is 387.91 kg too low. Sister batch 2-184 (offload_3) shows opposite-direction discrepancy of same magnitude. Sum across 4 offloads = 78,020 kg in both files (mass conserved, but mis-allocated between offloads 3 and 4). Certify uses the Ops Notes value (12.031 t) which under-reports this batch's mass.
_cross_check_findings_for_gate_2.magnitude: 388 kg = ~3.1% of cargo, ~0.61 tCO2e gross under-claim, ~3.6% of net 17.09 tCO2e — below 5% materiality but a real data error

_cross_check_findings_for_gate_2.finding: RAIL EMBODIED EF NOW 2026-CORRECT: Unlike batch 2-182 which had stale 0.0000352240 MTCO2e/mi, batch 2-185 modal shows 0.03113 kgCO2e/mi = 0.0000311307 MTCO2e/mi which is the correct 2026 value from Standard EFs sheet. PASS on EF correctness (item 9.2 / 6.x).

GENERIC FILENAMES (FLAG candidates on item 9.9 / 9.10): 'Screenshot 2026-04-10 at 3.19.33 PM.png', 'Screenshot 2026-02-23 at 11.29.10 AM.png', 'Screenshot 2026-01-27 125934.png', 'image (44).png'. Same 4 generic filenames as batch 2-182 (shared datapoints across rail batches). Process hygiene FLAG, not FAIL.

OPS NOTES vs COBB DATE DISCREPANCY: Ops Notes Completion Date = 4/2/2026; COBB order_line_completed_on = 2026-03-27 19:52:03 (same value across all 4 sister batches 2-182/183/184/185). Likely the COBB column tracks order line creation/completion in inventory system, not per-batch injection date. Needs Garrett confirmation; possible FLAG on item 5.6 pending clarification.
BCU MATCHES TRANSPORT PROCESS EXACTLY: BCU - Transport = 0.892 tCO2e = 0.148 + 0.685 + 0.059 (sum of 3 transport process activities). PASS on BCU >= activity test (item 9.6).
CARBON CONTENT in lab range: 43.1% within AECN 2-SD range (27.2%-51.6%). PASS on item 4.2.

PYROLYSIS EF NOTE: 0.1038 tCO2e/t (modal) vs 0.10402 in KB. The lower value matches H2 2025 LCA period source ('1Jul2025 to 31Dec2025 S.xlsx'). Likely correct for this batch's biomass period; verify in Gate 2.

RAILCAR FULLY DRAWN DOWN (Section 8 last-batch check): Ops Notes shows Oil Left in Railcar = 0 MT. Sum of 4 offload Cargo Masses = 78,020 kg = 78.02 MT total loaded mass. N_offloads (4) >= N_inbound_BOLs (3). Per-offload uncertainty framing is conservative (PASS on Section 8 🚂 Rail check).
